title: Empire of Pain
author: Patrick Radden Keefe
subline: The secret history of the Sackler dynasty.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A pill bottle tipped on its side, spilling a sea of pills across the lower half. The bottle is hairline; the pills are small circles. One pill is RED, half-dissolved at the spout. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- The pill bottle, tipped on its side (left) -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2.5">
      <!-- Bottle body (horizontal, on left) -->
      <rect x="-560" y="-100" width="320" height="200"/>
      <!-- Bottle neck (open, on the right end) -->
      <rect x="-240" y="-60" width="40" height="120"/>
      <!-- Bottle cap (off, lying separately) -->
      <rect x="-140" y="60" width="60" height="40"/>
      <!-- RX label area on the bottle -->
      <rect x="-540" y="-80" width="160" height="160" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The spilled pills: a sea of small ash circles cascading out of the open bottle -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <!-- Pills closest to the bottle (smaller, denser) -->
      <circle cx="-180" cy="-40" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="-140" cy="20" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="-100" cy="-30" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="-60" cy="40" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="-20" cy="0" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="20" cy="50" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="20" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="100" cy="70" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="140" cy="40" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="180" cy="90" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="220" cy="60" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="260" cy="110" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="300" cy="80" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="340" cy="130" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="380" cy="100" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="420" cy="150" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="460" cy="120" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="500" cy="170" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="540" cy="140" r="10"/>
    </g>
    <!-- One single RED pill, larger, half-dissolved at the bottle's mouth -->
    <g fill="#fc1c46">
      <circle cx="-200" cy="-80" r="14"/>
    </g>
    <text x="-200" y="-110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.3em">OXY</text>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">A DYNASTY · A CRISIS · A NATION</text>
</svg>
rationale: A hairline pill bottle tipped on its side, cap off. A cascade of small ash circles (pills) pours out across the lower half. A single RED pill, larger, sits at the bottle's mouth with 'OXY' label — the origin point of the crisis. Title 360px uppercase, two lines, weight 500.
